appDescription: Solve chess puzzles and sharpen your mind.
headerSubtitle: Solve chess puzzles and sharpen your tactical mind.
footerPoweredBy: Powered by Next.js, TailwindCSS, and a passion for chess.
toastErrorFetchingPuzzleDescription: An unexpected error occurred while fetching a new puzzle. Please try again later.
toastErrorNetwork: Network error. Failed to fetch puzzle. Please check your connection or try again later.
toastPuzzleErrorDescription: The puzzle solution has an invalid move for the app. Please try a new puzzle.
toastNotYourPieceDescription: You are playing as {orientation}. You can only move {orientation} pieces.
toastNotYourTurnDescription: It's {turn}'s turn. You are playing as {orientation}.
toastIncorrectMoveDescription: Expected the solution move, but you played {san}. Try again.
toastPuzzleResetDescription: The current puzzle has been reset.
toastHintUnavailableDescription: Cannot show hint at this time.
toastHintErrorNoMoreMoves: No more moves in the solution for a hint.
toastHintErrorInvalidFormat: Invalid solution move format for hint.
